description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: An Alignment Conserver is fully responsible for meeting all requirements tied to the general AC role, which requirements are specified in this Article.

In addition, Aligned Delegates and Facilitators must adhere to the specific requirements tied to their specialized roles. These specific requirements are detailed in [A.1.5 - Aligned Delegates](75f0063c-ad70-49e4-b356-9b76097ced7b) and [A.1.6 - Facilitators](1ce24b08-84ff-4524-9710-49bba429c6ef). Breaching these role-specific requirements and responsibilities is misalignment equivalent to breaching the general AC-requirements.
description: Extra spaces have been removed. --- The following have been kept unchanged: - Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces - Interlinear spaces - Table layouts excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces Newlines have not been changed.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: An Alignment Conserver is fully responsible for meeting all requirements tied to the general AC role, which requirements are specified in this Article.
In addition, Aligned Delegates and Facilitators must adhere to the specific requirements tied to their specialized roles. These specific requirements are detailed in [A.1.
- Facilitators](1ce24b08-84ff-4524-9710-49bba429c6ef). Breaching these role-specific requirements and responsibilities is misalignment equivalent to breaching the general AC-requirements.
